command:
echo "=== BACKUP OLD POLLER ==="
cp /home/jose/claude-poller.sh /home/jose/claude-poller.sh.bak
echo "backup done"

echo "=== WRITE NEW POLLER ==="
echo "" | base64 -d > /home/jose/claude-poller.sh
chmod +x /home/jose/claude-poller.sh
echo "new poller written"

echo "=== VERIFY ==="
head -5 /home/jose/claude-poller.sh
grep "LAST_ID_FILE" /home/jose/claude-poller.sh

echo "=== RESTART POLLER ==="
sudo systemctl restart claude-poller
sleep 3
sudo systemctl status claude-poller --no-pager -l | head -20
